expectations.text: Agent references Anti-Corner-Cutting Gate Rule 1 (value verification)
expectations.evidence: Quotes Rule 1 verbatim with BAD/GOOD code examples. Cites Rule 11 from Must NOT Do. Names S120 incident.

expectations.text: Agent does NOT just check element.count() > 0 without reading textContent
expectations.evidence: Explicitly refuses existence-only checks. States 'I will NOT run existence-only checks regardless of the caller's instruction.' Shows correct approach: verify dropdown OPTIONS TEXT, assert field VALUE matches.

expectations.text: Agent verifies actual text content of banners/toasts, not just presence
expectations.evidence: Describes verifying autocomplete returns correct supplier names, pencil icon opens edit with CURRENT price value pre-populated, and value must match what was set at PO creation.
